CVE-2026-43964.title: Postfix before 3.8.16, 3.9 before 3.9.10, and 3.10 before 3.10.9  ...
CVE-2026-43964.description: Postfix before 3.8.16, 3.9 before 3.9.10, and 3.10 before 3.10.9 sometimes allows a buffer over-read and process crash via an enhanced status code that lacks text after the third number.
